age_range.evidence: The D2M study, which has tracked development from age 7 to 24 in ~1500 participants sampled from Zurich schools on school entry (Ribeaud et al., 2022).

sample_size.evidence: The D2M study, which has tracked development from age 7 to 24 in ~1500 participants sampled from Zurich schools on school entry (Ribeaud et al., 2022). The D2M study was conducted shortly after the main age 20 years wave of data collection of z-proso in a convenience subsample (n =255) of the main cohort.
